query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and are closest to the municipality centroid, sorted by shortest distance first.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get high-risk quick-clay hazard areas by spatial intersection with Trondheim municipality geometry

3.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality by kommunenummer

4.description: find buildings intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance
